title: Warm Japanese Zucchini Miso Ramen
description: A garlicky, silky ramen that warms the soul with fresh zucchini and rich miso, finished with a touch of sesame and chili.

ingredients.name: ramen noodles
ingredients.notes: strawberry or rice based for gluten free option

ingredients.name: dashi stock
ingredients.notes: use kombu dashi or instant dashi powder dissolved in water

ingredients.name: miso paste
ingredients.notes: prefer white or yellow miso for milder flavor

instructions: Bring the dashi stock to a gentle simmer in a medium pot.
Add minced garlic, ginger, and chili flakes to the stock and let infuse for 2 minutes.
Stir in miso paste and soy sauce until the miso is fully dissolved and the broth is smooth.
Add the sliced zucchini and simmer for 3 minutes, just until the zucchini is tender but still firm.
Add ramen noodles and cook according to package instructions, about 4 minutes, until al dente.
Drain the noodles and divide them between two bowls, then pour the hot miso broth over the noodles and zucchini.
Drizzle sesame oil over the bowl and sprinkle the sliced scallion and sesame seeds on top.
Serve immediately while the broth is steaming and the flavors meld.
Optional: add a soft boiled egg for extra protein and richness.
Enjoy the comforting garlicky and silky warmth of this quick ramen.
